sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14574" key="a)/pugos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄπῡγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n14574.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without buttocks,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0260.tlg001:7:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Semon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.76</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0497.tlg001:184:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pl.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">184.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
